hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if '/core/' in path or '/shell/' in path:
    print('BLOCKED: Edits to core/ and shell/ must go through @core-dev or @shell-dev agents. Spawn the appropriate agent instead.', flush=True)
    sys.exit(2)
"
